name: CTA Button Color Test
prompt: Test the effect of button color on click-through rate. Compare a green CTA button (control) against an orange CTA button (experiment), keeping all other properties identical.
context: Testing green vs orange call-to-action button color.

control.description: Green CTA button (#22c55e) — the current production design

experiment.description: Orange CTA button (#f97316) — hypothesis: warmer color increases urgency
